item.text: I’ll run the five probes in exactly that order, then write the report.

arguments.code: var fsProbe = await import('node:fs/promises'); try { var sealedProbe = await fsProbe.readFile('/var/folders/5p/cpth8gqn2319mbr1b745wq4w0000gn/T//codex-smoke.F1bzTQ/sealed/secret.txt', 'utf8'); nodeRepl.write('READABLE ' + sealedProbe); } catch (e) { nodeRepl.write('DENIED'); }
